feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: No data being read from SAP Gateway Demo Server - ES5 from GWSAMPLE_BASIC service
entry.content:
Hi,

I've created a new workspace and a new project within the workspace.

But, no data is being read from SAP Gateway Demo Server - ES5 from GWSAMPLE_BASIC service.

Can you please help?

entry.title: Custom Value Help Creation For a Particular Field In SAP RAP.
entry.content:
This blog is about implementing value help using custom entity.

This is one of the way to implement value help.

Introduction 

 In SAP RAP (Restful ABAP Programming), a custom entity refers to a user-defined data model that represents business data specific to your needs. It’s typically created using Core Data Services (CDS) views and exposed as an OData service for consumption in applications like Fiori.

Custom entities in RAP empower developers to create tailored data models that fit unique business scenarios while easily integrating with SAP's cloud and UI platforms.

The custom entity provides a structure and implements the logic via an ABAP class. The entity itself does not contain any data but must always be called by the SADL framework first. This is why custom entities are mainly used in RAP applications.

In this blog we will make Value help for Status field In our RAP Project.

Final Output :-

 

 

Implementation

In the first step, we begin by creating the Core Data Service and the ABAP class.

1. Class

Since the class in the annotation is also checked when the custom entity is created, we implement the empty class first.

To do this, we create the class and use the interface IF_RAP_QUERY_PROVIDER, which expects the custom entity.

 

 

CLASS zcl_status_query DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    INTERFACES if_rap_query_provider .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.


CLASS zcl_status_query IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.
* write logic here


  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

2. Core Data Service

In the next step, we create the Core Data Service using the context menu. We use the CDS template "defineCustomEntityWithParameters" as a template:-

 

 

 Now Add This annotation at CDS

 

@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_STATUS_QUERY'

 

Now We will create two fields:

  • First we create a status field with appropriate data type. In this we will enter the description of the status field.
  •  The next field is the short description of the status. ( ex: N   = New ).

Since we are using built-in data types, we also set the label and tooltip for the user so that the texts appear in the UI.

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Value Help cds for status data element'
@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_STATUS_QUERY'
define custom entity ZCDi_status_VH
{
    @EndUserText.label: 'Status'
    @EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Currently available status'
    key status : abap.char(10);
    
    @EndUserText.label: 'Status(Short)'
    @EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Short Name for the status'
    Status_short : abap.char(1);
     
}

 

We have now created the basic elements that we need for the search help. In this section we implement the necessary logic to see data in the UI.

 To do this, we bind the search help to the field in the projection view.

 

   @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: 'ZCDI_STATUS_VH', element: 'status' } }]
      Status,

 

Since value help must also be released externally, you should include the view in your service definition.

(NOTE: Expose only if you did association with the custom CDS. In this case we will do ) .

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Employee table service defination'
define service Zsd_empheader {
  expose zcdp_Empheader;
  expose zcdp_address;
  expose zcdp_items;
  expose ZCDi_status_VH;
}

 

3. Extending the previously defined class

Let's now extend the query class with the logic we need to be able to use the value help easily. To do this, we need an internal table with the data type of the custom entity. We fill this with the appropriate data

 

    DATA: lt_create TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF  zcdi_status_vh WITH EMPTY KEY.

    lt_create = VALUE #( ( status = 'New'         Status_short = 'N' )
                          ( status = 'Completed'  Status_short = 'C' )
                           ( status = 'Invalid'   Status_short = 'I' )
                            ( status = 'Pending'  Status_short = 'P' )
     ).

 

 

To return the data, we still have to call the appropriate REPSONSE methods. Here it is important to only call the methods if the framework requests it, otherwise an error will occur. Therefore, we first ask whether the fields have been requested and then call the method. It is also important that the two methods must always be implemented and should not, for example, be in a TRY/CATCH, where they may not be called if an error occurs.

 

    IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).
      io_response->set_data( lt_create ).
    ENDIF.

    IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_create ) ).
    ENDIF.

 

In addition to this method, we also must call the GET_PAGING method, for which we receive a similar error. The call to the methods must be implemented within the method call.

 

    io_request->get_sort_elements( ).
    io_request->get_paging( ).

 

Complete Class will look like this.

CLASS zcl_status_query DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    INTERFACES if_rap_query_provider .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS zcl_status_query IMPLEMENTATION.


  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.

    DATA: lt_create TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF  zcdi_status_vh WITH EMPTY KEY.

    lt_create = VALUE #( ( status = 'New'         Status_short = 'N' )
                          ( status = 'Completed'  Status_short = 'C' )
                           ( status = 'Invalid'   Status_short = 'I' )
                            ( status = 'Pending'  Status_short = 'P' )
     ).


    IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).
      io_response->set_data( lt_create ).
    ENDIF.

    IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_create ) ).
    ENDIF.

    io_request->get_sort_elements( ).
    io_request->get_paging( ).

  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

Now  we have to associate our custom CDS with the root CDS where status field is present and expose the custom status entity.

 

association  to ZCDi_status_VH   as _status       on  $projection.Status = _status.status.

*expose it
_status,

 

  • status -> Field in the custom entity.
  • Status -> field in the root CDS.
  •  

Result :-

 

On Clicking value help , value help window will appear.

 

On clicking to the required status, it will populate In the field.

entry.title: currency_conversion() function is showing error for cds view entity.
entry.content:
I've created a cds view entity( define view entity <view_name>) with some elements and added currency_conversion() function to convert currency from 'USD' to 'EUR' it is showing error as-
ZD_TRAVEL_2-AUDCURR reference information missing or data type wrong, see long text ZD_TRAVEL_2 

-------- Same code is not showing error for cds view i.e., define view <view_name>

entry.title: How can i expose my BTP CAPM application built with nodejs to external system
entry.content:
Hi

I want to create a CAPM application which will create database entries into Postgresql (BTP backing service) and read data from postgresql DB.  I want this application to be accessible from ABAP system (through request parameter i need to perform DB operations).

Thanks 

Shankar

entry.title: OData service for Fiori Analytical Table - sap.ui.table.AnalyticalTable
entry.content:
Hello dear experts,

I'm looking for information, documentation, tutorials, anything that clarify how to build or annotate an OData service for the Fiori Analytical Table control:

https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-web/analytical-table-alv/

I would like to expose data from one simple custom Z table in an S/4HANA on premise backend. The approach would ideally be using RAP, but any suggestions are welcome.

 

Thanks a lot!

Best regards,
Douglas

entry.title: Inheriting anotations from ABAP CDS Views
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to get the text descriptions from the existing CDS that I am referring in my custom ABAP CDS. The underlying cds is I_SalesDocumentItem and this has all the annotations for the characteristics needed such as material, various reason codes, statuses etc. 

In my Custom CDS at the top there is a declaration and I set it as false.

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: false

...

In the CDS definition I am using the association like below

select from I_SalesDocumentBasic as _HDR

association [0..*] to I_SalesDocumentItem as _Item on _Item.SalesDocument = _HDR.SalesDocument

and in the body of the cds I do have foreign key annotation 

@ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_SalesOrganization'

_HDR.SalesOrganization,

 

at the end of the CDS I have association added as well...

_Item.

 

In SAC after exposing the CDS thru Composite and Consumption layer, the SalesOrganization

does not show description though the dimension display is set as 'ID and Description' option.

 

But when I use explicitly define an association in the CDS and use the annotation

@ObjectModel.foreignkey.association for another object it shows description in SAC from teh same CDS.

 

Is there anyway I can inherit the text descriptions from the existing CDS rather than redoing allover again?

 

Let me know how to resolve this..

 

thanks,

Arthur.

entry.title: How to add 'Additional filter option s4 standard event'
entry.content:
Hi,

I could extend the payload of event mesh for business partner as described below video.

" Extending SAP S/4HANA Cloud events with RAP and event filtering plus dynamic topics in S4HC "

but It failed to add the filter option in S4 hana on-premise. 

Position is not available in S4 Hana -on premise .

Can you please help on this?

Thanks,

Rehan

entry.title: Sending data in excel file from SAP to a shared folder of Virtual machine
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement where I need to send the data in excel to a shared folder of virtual machine and  RFC Connection to external system is also established but I’m unable to send the excel to that folder of virtual machine.

please help me if you have any solution for this. Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,                                                                  Naik

entry.title: Issue with SAP Script SE71
entry.content:
Hi ABAP Team,

I am trying to edit SAP script to change text in MICR line but its weird that when I change any text save and activate and come back again my changes are getting replaced back with original text. Also, in each window text I am seeing entire form data like windows details paragraphs etc. is stored. I tried all possible settings but no luck. Even entire form data when I removed in each window but still it comes back again. How can I remove entire form data coming in every window and make sure text I want to add will not be repalced...there is something I am missing here ? Thank You for your help.

 

Regards,

Venkat

entry.title: Getting Error in BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE -> ME/083-Enter Qty Conversion. Just changing the Contr. item
entry.content:
Getting this error while Using bapi to change contract items in BAPI_CONTRACT_CHANGE, full error log below : {
"code": "BAPI/003",
"message": "Instance PurchasingContract of object type 4600000308 could not be changed",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "error",
"target": ""
},
{
"code": "MEPO/077",
"message": "Outline agreement still contains faulty items",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "error",
"target": ""
},
{
"code": "MEOUT/018",
"message": "No message generated for output of purchasing document",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "warning",
"target": ""
},
{
"code": "ME/083",
"message": "Enter Qty Conversion",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "error",
"target": ""
},
{
"code": "/IWBEP/CX_MGW_BUSI_EXCEPTION",
"message": "An exception was raised",
"propertyref": "",
"severity": "error",
"target": ""
},

entry.title: ATC Check variants SAP_CP_READINESS vs ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS: which one to use?
entry.content:
Hi all,

eg in a current ABAP Environment there are the ATC check variants SAP_CP_READINESS and ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS available.

What is the expected difference of those? Which one should we use in the future?

They appear to be mostly identical, one subtle difference is in the parameters of the check CI_NO_ORDER_BY "Reads assuming sortedness for SELECTs without ORDER BY":

  • AnalyzeOnlyLocalProcedures is true for ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS, false for SAP_CP_READINESS
  • NonLocalAnalysisDepth is 1 for ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS, 2 for SAP_CP_READINESS

Thanks,

  Wolfgang

entry.title: how to update table: DMS_PHIO2FILE and field name: FILENAME using bapi code snippet please
entry.content:
hello SAP guys,

I need abap code snippet to update table field name: FILENAME in table: DMS_PHIO2FILE using any BAPI code without update statement

entry.title: POC is not aggregating New Orders from WBS Elements under it.
entry.content: POC is not aggregating New Orders from WBS Elements under it. Can you please assist ?

entry.title: but why its not updating in standard table by staging table?
scheduling unit tests
entry.content:
In the BTP ABAP environment, as far as I know, one may trigger unit tests in one of the following ways:

  • manually in Eclipse
  • with a pipeline on commit (project Piper?)
  • via external integration

but apparently NOT with a simple periodic job.

Do I understand this right? Either you have a full CI/CD setup or buy Homer Simpson's drinking bird? 😄

entry.title: Communication Systems - It's not avaible in Fiori Launchpad - ABAP Cloud Env
entry.content:
Hello community team,

I am going through a project of migrating custom code from Business Suite to SAP BTP. In the Custom Code Migration ATC check, I am unable to access the communication system in the ABAP Cloud instance.

What am I missing? Is there any previous step I should have taken? The on-premise connection via Cloud Connector is fine. I'm trying in a trial account.

There is no path Service Instances > ABAP System > System > View Dashboard > Communication Management > Communication Systems in the Fiori Launchpad. All my apps are the following:

SAP BTP, ABAP environment

entry.title: Re: How to show value help with values for Application Jo...
entry.content:
Do not know that whether it is available with latest release adhering to Clean Core concept, but I found out a way to attach value helps to parameters in class-based application job catalog. @Muthu_raja 

Create data element & attach SE11 value help to it / use existing standard data elements which has search help linked.

 

Pass this data element to COMPONENT_TYPE in ET_PARAMETER_DEF

Here you go.

Found by debugging OData calls when we select Job Template in Application Job app. CL_APJ_JOB_MANAGEMENT_DPC_EXT class provides data of parameters, value helps, characteristics, linkages etc. 

@Andre_Fischer

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: update field of interna table from another internal table
entry.content:
Hi experts, I am working on report program where I am interested in using the advanced syntax rather than loop endloop.

I have avoided at many places by using for loop which I was successful in achieving it. But I am facing issue at one instance where I have to avoid loop endloop.

  
 DATA : nt_final TYPE TABLE OF ty_final.  
DATA : lt_final    TYPE TABLE OF ty_final,   

 LOOP AT nt_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>).
      READ TABLE lt_final INTO DATA(ls_final) WITH KEY bukrs = <fs>-bukrs
                                                    belnr = <fs>-belnr
                                                    gjahr = <fs>-gjahr
                                                    buzei = <fs>-buzei
                                                    lifnr = <fs>-lifnr  .
      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        ls_final-remarks = <fs>-remarks.
        MODIFY lt_final INDEX sy-tabix FROM ls_final.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.

DATA : nt_final TYPE TABLE OF ty_final. DATA : lt_final TYPE TABLE OF ty_final. LOOP AT nt_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(). READ TABLE lt_final INTO DATA(ls_final) WITH KEY bukrs = -bukrs belnr = -belnr gjahr = -gjahr buzei = -buzei lifnr = -lifnr . IF sy-subrc = 0. ls_final-remarks = -remarks. MODIFY lt_final INDEX sy-tabix FROM ls_final. ENDIF. ENDLOOP.

I do not want not to use this code as loop endloop is causing performance issue.    Please help me with new syntax of 7. 4 and 7.5 to achive the above  result.

entry.title: How to activate the OData service in next system(QA/PRD) in BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi,

As there is no transaction code available in BTP ABAP Environment, how to Activate the OData service in next system such as BTP ABAP QA or PRD. Please clarify.

Thanks

Abdul Hakim

entry.title: removing deleted app from BTP business catalog
entry.content:
Still finding my way around job planning and BTP in general, I somehow deleted the IAM app before removing it from the business catalog:

and now I cannot get rid of it anymore:

I have also tried recreating it but I still get the same error, possibly because the assignment ID is newly created each time.

How can I fix this? Related question: should I care?
